//: A3 PR3 — the sample-world E2E walkthrough (docs/superpowers/specs — see sample-world.walkthrough.test.js's own header). This is the AUTHORED input (a scripted list of typed terminal commands, exactly as a player would type them into createTerminalSession's submit(line)), not the committed event log itself — that is derived by validate()/reduce() at test time via the SAME recording wrapper the test file documents, and is what actually gets replayed through @golem-engine/kernel's replay(). Committed here so the walkthrough is a permanent, inspectable artifact, mirroring games/some-hero/tests/e2e-headless/full-route.log.json's own 'authored commands, derived events' split.
//route: village square -> forest road -> forest clearing -> enchanted pond -> deep forest path -> misty glen -> fae circle -> haunted grove: the secret portal (haunted_grove<->ancient_ruin) is DENIED here (index 10, no insight yet). Backtrack, take+eat the rare mushroom (deep forest path) to set mushroom_insight, walk the SAME path back to haunted grove: the secret portal is now ALLOWED (index 19, the walkability climax) -- proven by real go commands, not a hand-built state. Through the portal: ancient ruin -> hidden waterfall, take the sparkling fish (Portable+Interactable.enabledWhen gated on the SAME insight fact -- already satisfied). Back out, to forest clearing -> wizard's tower: talk to the wizard while still holding the rare mushroom (eating it never removes it from inventory -- module.js's USED case never touches roomItems/inventory) satisfies his Spawns.when (has_rare_mushroom + not wizard_gave_key), handing over the odd key. Take the key, walk all the way back to the village square -> back alley -> secret hideout: the back door (keyed on has_odd_key) is DENIED early (index 1, before the key exists) and ALLOWED at the end (index 36) -- the second locked-door proof, opened with the wizard's own reward.
//denials: Exactly 2 of the 37 commands below are EXPECTED denials (asserted by name in the test, not just tolerated): index 1 ('go secret_hideout', the back door before the odd key) and index 10 ('go ancient_ruin', the secret portal before insight). Every other command is asserted legal (no Denial).
//contentHash: imported-content/adventure/content/pack.json's own top-level "hash" field -- the REAL committed content pack this route runs against (compileContentPack() re-derives it at test time and the test asserts equality against this fixed string), for the '(contentHash, seed, log)' framing.
